# Pretband Help Ons Bloaz'n

Pretband is a lively brass band from Brummen, the Netherlands, known for festivals, street parties, and unforgettable performances.

## About

- Pretband is a Dutch party brass band based in Brummen.
- The band brings energy, humor, and musical fun to events of all sizes, from walking acts to full stage sets.
- Pretband is part of the Harmonieorkest Brummen community.

## Booking

- Book the band for festivals, street parties, private celebrations, and corporate events.
- Contact: info@pretband.nl
- Website: https://pretband.nl

## More information

For a fuller description of the band, its style, and its performance formats, see [llms-full.txt](https://pretband.nl/llms-full.txt).

## Links

- [Website](https://pretband.nl)
- [Email](mailto:info@pretband.nl)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/imreboersma/pretband)
- [Harmonieorkest Brummen](https://harmonieorkestbrummen.nl)

## Example

```bash
curl https://pretband.nl
```
